dsl_rule.translation_notes: Double bottom pattern detection requires multi-bar low analysis not directly available in indicator set. Approximated using pivot point as pattern resistance level and volume confirmation. Entry: price breaks above pivot on heavy volume (>20-day historical average). Exit: reversal below pivot. Stop loss set to 3.3% based on average decline data (-33%). Hold period set to 20 days for typical pattern reversion window.

source_rule_text: Double bottom pattern with narrow or spike bottoms showing upward breakout
